name: splitora
description: Splitora is a full-stack group expense splitting platform.

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.db:ensure: sh -c 'if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run db:up; else echo "Docker not found. Ensure Postgres is running on localhost:5432"; fi'
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev:local: npm run db:ensure && npm run db:migrate && concurrently "npm run server:dev" "npm run client:dev"
scripts.dev:alt: npm run db:ensure && npm run db:migrate && concurrently "npm run server:dev:alt" "npm run client:dev:alt"
scripts.client:dev:alt: VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:10002/api VITE_SOCKET_URL=http://localhost:10002 npm --prefix client run dev -- --host localhost --port 5175
scripts.server:dev:alt: PORT=10002 CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:5175 npm --prefix server run dev
